title: MEN'S SHELTER - 211info
text: ASTORIA RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an emergency shelter stay up to five nights and an additional six month Christian-based transitional housing program. The shelter administers drug tests and searches the property of guests. Serves breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Access to a clothing closet, showers, and a laundry facility allowing one load per week. 62 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older, who are clean and sober. Must not have a registered sex offense. Hours: Check in for shelter: 7 days per week 5pm Email (503) 325-6243 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 325-6243 Main phone (503) 440-0789 Alternate Main phone (503) 325-6243 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Men Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - COMMUNITY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASTORIA RESCUE MISSION
